REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF MOTIONS TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY ACTION (TRANSACTION ID # 58232534) FILED BY DEFENDANT BATES WHITE, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BATES WHITE, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO WRITTEN AGREEMENT AND TO STAY ACTION IS GRANTED AND THE COURT STAYS THIS ACTION. PLAINTIFF RATIFIED THE CONTRACT AND IS OBLIGATED TO ARBITRATE. THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT MR. YURASEK WORKED FOR PERKINS COIE AND PERFORMED SERVICES ON THE CRAIGSLIST/E-BAY LITIGATION. MR. YURASEK COMMUNICATED WITH DEFENDANT AND THE COURT INFERS THAT HE HAD NOTICE OF THE ENGAGEMENT LETTER. MR. YURASEK BECAME P'S GENERAL COUNSEL IN JANUARY 2015. FROM THAT TIME UNTIL JUNE OF 2015, PLAINTIFF CONTINUED TO RECEIVE THE BENEFITS OF THE ENGAGEMENT LETTER. BECAUSE PLAINTIFF CONTINUED TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THE CONTRACT, IT WAS ALSO SUBJECT TO THE ARBITRATION PROVISION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 59757835) FILED BY DEFENDANT BATES WHITE, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-18-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Continued To Jan-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of And Petition To Lift Stay To Confirm Award Of Aribitrator And Request For Entry Of Judgment Thereon In Favor Of Petitioner And Defendant Bates White Llc And Against Respondent And Palitnff Craigslist. Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT BATES WHITE, LLC'S Petition To Lift Stay To Confirm Award Of Aribitrator And Request For Entry Of Judgment Thereon In Favor Of Petitioner And Defendant Bates White LLC And Against Respondent And Plaintiff Craigslist, Inc. is taken off calendar. The case was dismissed on November 21, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Continued To Dec-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Written Agreement And To Stay Action
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Llewellyn of Lewis & Llewellyn LLP telephone number 415-800-0592 for Plaintiff Craigslist, Inc.
David Evans and Stephen Squillario of Haight Brown & Bonesteel LLP telephone number 415-546-7500 for Defendant Bates White LLC

The Court signed a joint stipulation and order withdrawing the exhibits to the declaration of Keith Waehrer Ph.D. filed on December 16, 2015. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BATES WHITE, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Written Agreement And To Stay Action is granted and the court stays this action. Plaintiff ratified the contract and is obligated to arbitrate. The evidence shows that Mr. Yurasek worked for Perkins Coie and performed services on the Craigslist/e-Bay litigation. Mr. Yurasek communicated with defendant and the court infers that he had notice of the engagement letter. Mr. Yurasek became P's general counsel in January 2015. From that time until June of 2015, Plaintiff continued to receive the benefits of the engagement letter. Because plaintiff continued to take advantage of the contract, it was also subject to the arbitration provision. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
